record.field: <list><field name="state"/><field name="company_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="lock_date_field"/><field name="lock_date"/><field name="end_datetime"/></list>

<form><field name="active"/><field name="state"/><field name="company_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="reason"/><field name="lock_date_field"/><field name="lock_date"/><field name="company_lock_date"/><field name="fiscalyear_lock_date"/><field name="tax_lock_date"/><field name="sale_lock_date"/><field name="purchase_lock_date"/><field name="end_datetime"/></form>
